raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tee weens us
ohtru: kas irr scho Leetu darrijs?
un kad tee pahrinekleja/ un tswai-
zaja/ tad tappe faZZihts: Gideans
Joafa Dehls irr scho Leetu dar-
rijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija ta Pilsfahta
Wihrı us Joafu / istvedd tawn
Dehlu/ jo tam irr jamirst / tapehz
ka wiꞥſch Ba ila Altari nolausijs
irr/ un to kuplu Meschu/ kas tur
flaht bija/nozirtis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jons us wiſ-
feem / kas pee winna stahweja:
wuj juhs preekfch Ba ila bahrti-
tees? wuj juhs winnu ispestifteet?
kurſch preekfch winnu bahrfcees/
tam buhs wehl fhodeen nokantam
tapt / irr wiꞥſch weens Deews/
lai tas patssfewis labba baxrahs/
tapehz ka winna Altaris nolaui-
shts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz nofanze wiꞥſch to
tai Deena Jerub-Baalı / fazz-
dams: lai tas Ba ils barrahs ar
winnu pahr to / ka tas winna
Altari irr nolausijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad sapulzejahs wiſi Mi-
dijaniteri un Amalekiteri / un tee
Behrni vo Austruma puffes / un
pahrzehlahs / un apnettehs Jes-
reels Eeleija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apgehrbe ta KUN-
GA Gars Gideanu/ un wiꞥſch
trummeteja ar Trummeteim/un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wirsch fuhtija arri Weh-
stis zaur wiſfu Manaſſu/ tee tap
pe arridsan fafaukti / ka tee win-
nam pakkat nahktu. Wiirsch fuhtija arridsan Wehstis zaur Abse-
ru / un zaur Sebulann/ un zaur
Nawtalu / un tee nahze augſeha-
winnceim pretti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Gideans fazzija ue
Deewu: Ja tu Isra elu zaur man-
nu Rohku gribbi ispestiht / itt ka-
tu runnajs effi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redses nolikſchn weenu
Ahdu ar wiſfu Willu us Klohnun
kad ta Raffa us to Ahdu ween-
buhs/un us wiſfu Semini faufs/
tad finnafehu es / ka tu Isra elu
zaur mannu Rohku ispestifti / it-
ka tu faZZijs effi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas notifke ta. Jo-
wiꞥſch zehlahs Rihta Agrumā-
angſcham/ un isspeede to Ahdu/
un tsgreeſe to Raffu no Ahdas/
weenu Raafu pillu ar Uhdeni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Gideans fazzija us Dee-
wu: Laid tawa Bahrsiba pret-
man ne apskaistahs / ka es tikka-
scho Reisi runnaju/ lai es jelle tik-
kai schim Brihscham ar to Ahdu-
bandohs / laid jelle faufs irr us to
Ahdu ween/ un us wiſfu to Sem-
mi laid Raffa irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Deews darrija ta tan-
ni Nakti/ jo Saufuuns bija us to
Ahdu ween/ un us wiſfu to Sem-
mi bija Raffa.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
